current_run.problem_name: Hidden XOR of Rotated Quadratic Terms
current_run.description: Given an N-bit integer secret s, we define a function f(x) = (x rotated left by 1) XOR (x^2 mod 2^N) XOR (x XOR s). We want to find s. The rotation introduces a non-linear dependency on adjacent bits, and the quadratic term and XOR with s ensures non-linearity and difficulty in standard algebraic manipulation.
